title: Ex-Twitter CEO Dick Costolo reacts to Eric Schmidt’s Commencement Booing
summary: Ex-Twitter CEO Dick Costolo comments on Eric Schmidt facing audience booing during a commencement speech. The segment captures reaction and discussion of a notable moment in tech industry news.
